# aiven_cmk_accessor_gcp (Data Source)

Gets the GCP CMK accessor for an Aiven project. The accessor is used to authenticate Aiven to your Google Cloud Key Management Service (KMS).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "aiven_cmk_accessor_gcp" "example" {
  project = "my-project"

  /* COMPUTED FIELDS
  access_group = "foo"
  */
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project` (String) Project name.

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `access_group` (String) The GCP access group that Aiven uses to access your Cloud KMS key.
- `id` (String) Resource ID, equal to `project`.

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `read` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).
